sections.paragraph:
ἑσπερινός, ή, όν (s. prec. entry; since X., Resp. Lac. 12, 6; POxy 901, 5; BGU 1024 VI, 6; LXX) pert. to the evening, of evening φυλακή the first watch of the night, six to nine p.m. Lk 12:38 v.l.—M-M.

prec. prec. = preceding

  1. X. = Xenophon, V–IV b.c.—List 5

POxy POxy = Oxyrhynchus Papyri—List 4

BGU BGU = Aegyptische Urkunden aus den Museen zu Berlin: Griechische Urkunden—List 4

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

pert. pert. = pertaining (to)

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 397
